summary: Vertical selfie-style video recorded in an office. Early frames show a windowsill holding a row of blue spheres on clear stands, two of which carry a Department of Homeland Security seal and a military seal. The speaker, a bearded man in a dark suit with an American flag lapel pin, then addresses the camera while standing in a wood-trimmed office with green walls, a desk, and upholstered chairs. Burned-in caption subtitles appear at the bottom of the frame (for example 'ANYWAYS JUST WANT' and 'I THINK I'). The audio is the man speaking directly to camera about his first week at DHS, an ongoing government shutdown, and employees working without pay. No music bed.

script.scene: Windowsill with three blue spheres on clear stands, two bearing a DHS seal and a military seal; daylight through the window; caption 'ANYWAYS JUST WANT.'
Bearded man in a dark suit with flag pin speaks to camera in a green wood-trimmed office with a desk and chairs; caption 'I THINK I.'
